title: RPA Operations Analyst
summary: Own daily bot monitoring, triage exceptions fast, and keep hiring operations moving with clear status control.
description:
Role summary

Northstar is hiring an RPA Operations Analyst to keep hiring automation running cleanly across intake, review, and assessment workflows.

What you will do

  • Review workflow exceptions and unblock priority cases.
  • Coordinate with HR and operations on urgent applicant movement.
  • Keep assessment and candidate flow reliable day to day.

Why this role matters

This role helps the team move faster without losing control.
